title: Emotion 01: For My Own Soul
overview: An injured boxer transfers to Gloria Academy and ends up in the music dept. to find he has a "gift."

title: Emotion 02: Nachtmusik Will Change Into Wings
overview: Mozart was offered to write music for ice skater, Misha Cartin. Will he be able to impress the Ice Prince?

title: Emotion 3: Reality Through the Filtered Lens
overview: After scoring low on his exam, Beethoven gets appointed a tutor by Miharagi. And that tutor is… Chopin?!

title: Emotion 04: Tonight, Enjoy a Playful Dream
overview: Frustrated, Beethoven runs into Liszt, who sheds a new light on his situation. Will Beethoven find his path?

title: Emotion 05: Howl. Sing. Create
overview: Now that Beethoven has decided to join, he must prove to his teammates how serious he is by writing a song.

title: Emotion 06: The First Star
overview: It's showtime. Beethoven must make up for lost time as they practice their routine for the preliminaries.

title: Emotion 07: Acceptance of the Heart
overview: The group feels hopeless as tension rises between the members. Will a trip to the hot springs reunite them?

title: Emotion 08: Love Is Freedom
overview: Qualifying in the preliminary, the group is ready to move on, except Liszt. Will Gran★MyStar lose a member?!

title: Emotion 09: A Rough Nightmare
overview: Every time Chopin sees his own reflection, he refuses to look. Will he be able to fight off his inner demons?

title: Emotion 10: An Irreversible Note
overview: Mozart's traumatic past is triggered when "he" appears. Will Mozart overcome it and look to the future?

title: Emotion 11: Light Up the Love for Music in This Beat
Emotion 12: One to Place Judgment
overview: With Beethoven critically injured, will Gran★MyStar be able to perform at the finals and surpass DIs=Cord?!

title: Emotion 13: STARS MELODY
overview: As the last performers, will Gran★MyStar manage to take the top?! The world is in for a surprise.
